headline: Hotel chains investigated over potential cartel pricing
summary: Britain’s competition watchdog has launched an investigation into three of the world’s biggest hotel chains amid fears about price fixing.

raw.headline: Hotel chains investigated over potential cartel pricing

headline: UK Competition And Markets Authority Probes Hilton, Marriott, IHG And CoStar Over Alleged Sharing Of Competitively Sensitive Hotel Data
